summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of analytics system for Veracruz Contigo. All analytics endpoints are working correctly with proper authentication and data tracking.
passed_tests: Analytics track endpoint - POST /api/analytics/track with valid and invalid data
Analytics search tracking - POST /api/analytics/search with various term lengths
Global analytics dashboard - GET /api/analytics/global with admin authentication
Municipio analytics - GET /api/analytics/municipio/{id} with admin authentication
Analytics integration flow - Complete tracking and verification workflow
Authentication and authorization for analytics endpoints
Data structure validation for analytics responses
Error handling for invalid requests and unauthorized access
